items.title: Government issues notice to Meta; Bringing clean-label ice cream to India
items.summary: The Centre has issued a notice to Meta over alleged child sexual abuse material (CSAM) appearing in paid Instagram ads, seeking a detailed explanation within seven days. The gov...

items.title: Some of the nation’s rich are letting AI teach their kids
items.summary: Most Americans don't trust AI. It's proven that it doesn't know what safe toppings for pizza are. People don't even want to listen to AI music. But none of that matters for some...

items.title: Uber’s European expansion plans may have hit a speed bump
items.summary: Back in February, Uber announced ambitious plans to launch in seven new European markets in 2026 — but now five of those launches are reportedly on hold.
